text: {"matches":[{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 0 concerns participants with type 2 diabetes, whereas claim 1 refers to the general population."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 0 evaluates high egg intake, while claim 2 evaluates replacing an egg with whole grains."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 1 assesses egg consumption alone, whereas claim 2 assesses a substitution effect."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 3 notes possible residual confounding, while claim 0 reports an observed association."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 3 notes possible residual confounding, while claim 1 reports an observed lack of association."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 3 notes possible residual confounding, while claim 2 reports an observed benefit of substitution."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":4,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 4 states observational findings cannot establish causation, whereas claim 0 reports an association."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":4,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 4 states observational findings cannot establish causation, whereas claim 1 reports an association."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":4,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 4 states observational findings cannot establish causation, whereas claim 2 reports an association."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":4,"rationale":"Claim 3 addresses residual confounding, while claim 4 addresses lack of causal inference; both are methodological limitations."}]}
